title: Files, Directories, Links, and Metadata
description: Prepare a service workspace while preserving names, metadata, link intent, and the ability to reverse every operation. Learners cumulatively produce a reversible filesystem-change plan and evidence tree through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Identify regular files, directories, symbolic links, devices, sockets, and pipes from metadata rather than filename appearance.
Use mkdir, touch, cp, mv, and rm with explicit targets, collision checks, and recovery-aware previews.
Predict inode, path, deletion, filesystem, and permission behavior for hard and symbolic links.
